question.text: When was the regulation of the commodity derivatives market shifted to SEBI?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The FCRA 1952 was repealed and regulation of commodity derivatives was shifted to SEBI under SCRA 1956 with effect from 28th September 2015. **The Trap:** 2003 is when nationalized online exchanges became operational. 2000 is the National Agricultural Policy announcement. 2012 may confuse with SEBI Stock Exchange and Clearing Corporation Regulations. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII and XII also reference SEBI's regulatory jurisdiction timeline. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This merger under SEBI created a unified regulatory framework — equity, currency, and commodity derivatives all under one regulator, simplifying compliance for multi-segment participants.
